name: @forgeax/bevy-cubic-splines
description: Reproduction of Bevy's `cubic_splines` example (a smooth curve passing through control points) — a STATIC demo exercising the new vec3.catmullRom Catmull-Rom spline sampler (mapping Bevy's CubicCardinalSpline::new_catmull_rom), baking a bead polyline through a fixed control polygon.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle downstream of engine-runtime sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: cubic-splines static demo; fps no-regression covered by hello-cube / hello-room gates

bench.reason: cubic-splines demo; bench focus on engine-math / pixel-parity

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; Bevy cubic_splines reproduction
